stemHtml: With regard to Low Visibility Operations (LVO), which of the following items is of significant importance for the outcome of an approach and should be covered in the Operator`s procedures and instructions?

options.a: Both pilots looking for a visual reference when approaching the DH.
options.b: The correct seating and eye position of the Pilot Flying (PF).
options.c: Monitoring the Actual Navigation Performance (ANP) value throughout the approach.
options.d: The use of the barometric altimeter for determining the DH.
